args:
set -e
if [ -n "${STARCOIN_NODE_MCP_BIN:-}" ]; then
  if [ -n "${STARCOIN_NODE_MCP_CONFIG:-}" ]; then
    exec "$STARCOIN_NODE_MCP_BIN" --config "$STARCOIN_NODE_MCP_CONFIG"
  fi
  exec "$STARCOIN_NODE_MCP_BIN"
fi
if [ -n "${STARCOIN_NODE_MCP_CONFIG:-}" ]; then
  exec cargo run --quiet --manifest-path "${STARCOIN_NODE_MCP_MANIFEST:-/Users/simon/starcoin-projects/starcoin-mcp-codex-transfer-workflow/starcoin-node-mcp/crates/starcoin-node-mcp-server/Cargo.toml}" --bin starcoin-node-mcp -- --config "$STARCOIN_NODE_MCP_CONFIG"
fi
exec cargo run --quiet --manifest-path "${STARCOIN_NODE_MCP_MANIFEST:-/Users/simon/starcoin-projects/starcoin-mcp-codex-transfer-workflow/starcoin-node-mcp/crates/starcoin-node-mcp-server/Cargo.toml}" --bin starcoin-node-mcp

set -e
if [ -n "${STARMASK_MCP_BIN:-}" ]; then
  if [ -n "${STARMASK_MCP_DAEMON_SOCKET_PATH:-}" ]; then
    exec "$STARMASK_MCP_BIN" --daemon_socket_path "$STARMASK_MCP_DAEMON_SOCKET_PATH"
  fi
  exec "$STARMASK_MCP_BIN"
fi
if [ -n "${STARMASK_MCP_DAEMON_SOCKET_PATH:-}" ]; then
  exec cargo run --quiet --manifest-path "${STARMASK_MCP_MANIFEST:-/Users/simon/starcoin-projects/starcoin-mcp-codex-transfer-workflow/starmask-mcp/crates/starmask-mcp/Cargo.toml}" --bin starmask-mcp -- --daemon_socket_path "$STARMASK_MCP_DAEMON_SOCKET_PATH"
fi
exec cargo run --quiet --manifest-path "${STARMASK_MCP_MANIFEST:-/Users/simon/starcoin-projects/starcoin-mcp-codex-transfer-workflow/starmask-mcp/crates/starmask-mcp/Cargo.toml}" --bin starmask-mcp
